message:
refactor: unify tx-path scanner/insert to use full column set (PR #1872)

insertIssueTxIntoTable and scanIssueTxFromTable were using a minimal
subset of columns (20 of 46), silently dropping fields like mol_type,
hook_bead, role_bead, agent_state, due_at, defer_until, metadata, etc.
Delegate to insertIssueIntoTable and scanIssueFrom to ensure all columns
are written and hydrated in transaction context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
